prerequisites.reason: v1.7 closed out with regime collapse, action separation failure, and 243 safety-guard violations. v1.8 addresses all four root causes identified in the decomposition.
v1.7 protocol locked and executed. Results rejected. v1.8 inherits structural conventions but overhauls eligibility, selection, and parameter grid.

claim_scope.allowed_now: protocol lock and future-evidence contract only

baseline_note: All 6 baselines retained from v1.7 without weakening. switching_loss_max_pressure remains the hardest baseline per v1.7 failure decomposition (worst regret ~1.95M).

locked_holdout.fresh_seed_requirement: Holdout seeds must not overlap with any v1.7 or v1.8 training seed.

action_change_rate_overall.description: Overall action-change rate must exceed 5%, ensuring the controller meaningfully departs from pressure-based defaults.
action_change_rate_overall.rationale: v1.7 failed at 2.82%. v1.8 requires the regime-calibrated classifier to produce differentiated actions across regimes.

action_change_rate_storage_cascade.description: Action-change rate specifically in storage-binding and cascade-risk regimes must exceed 10%, ensuring these regimes produce substantially different actions from pressure.
action_change_rate_storage_cascade.rationale: v1.7 regime collapse meant storage and cascade regimes never activated. v1.8 requires meaningful deviation in the regimes where dual corrections should be strongest.

regime_balance.description: No single regime may account for more than 80% of binding decisions. At least 3 of 4 regimes (slack, storage_binding, cascade_risk, completion_critical) must each activate in at least 10% of binding decisions.
regime_balance.rationale: v1.7 collapsed entirely to completion_critical. v1.8 regime classifier must discriminate before training proceeds.

rollout_sign_accuracy.description: Predicted advantage direction (improve vs worsen) from rollout must match actual outcome direction in >60% of evaluated decisions.
rollout_sign_accuracy.v1_7_failure_value: pervasive activation with disconnected improvement (95.9% activation, 2.82% action change)
rollout_sign_accuracy.rationale: v1.7 rollout produced advantage-gate activations disconnected from real performance. v1.8 requires directional accuracy as a calibration gate.

no_catastrophic_unfinished_harm.description: Unfinished vehicle count must not increase by more than 5% relative to any baseline on any scenario-seed-demand combination. This is a hard safety floor.
no_catastrophic_unfinished_harm.rationale: v1.7 produced 133 unfinished violations. v1.8 enforces a per-row cap instead of aggregate tolerance.

no_practical_safety_harm.description: No safety-guard metric (penalized_avg_travel_time, total_delay) may show practical harm against any baseline. Practical harm = metric worse by >5% tolerance.
no_practical_safety_harm.v1_7_failure_value: 243 total safety-guard violations across all baselines
no_practical_safety_harm.rationale: v1.7 violated safety guards against all 6 baselines. v1.8 requires clean safety profile as a pre-selection gate.

selection_rule.formula: min over candidate params of max over baselines of [J(candidate, s) - J(baseline, s)]_+

win_vs_mp.description: At least 70% of training scenario x demand group combinations must show positive J improvement over max_pressure.
win_vs_mp.rationale: Generalized pressure claim requires consistent improvement over the base pressure baseline.

win_vs_core_finite_storage_baselines.description: Aggregate non-worse against capacity_aware_pressure, finite_storage_double_pressure, and occupancy_capacity_aware_pressure. Non-worse = no statistically significant regression (paired seed, p>0.05 two-sided).
win_vs_core_finite_storage_baselines.rationale: Controller must not regress against baselines that already incorporate storage/finite-capacity awareness.

switching_robustness.description: switching_loss_max_pressure must NOT be the dominant worst-regret baseline. If it is the worst baseline, its regret must be within 50% of the second-worst baseline's regret.
switching_robustness.v1_7_failure_value: switching_loss_max_pressure worst regret at ~1.95M, far exceeding all others
switching_robustness.rationale: v1.7 was dominated by switching_loss regret. v1.8 must include switching as a first-class mechanism.

mechanism_contribution.description: Each mechanism (storage, cascade, release, completion, switching) must contribute non-zero correction in its corresponding regime. Contribution = mean absolute dual-value weight associated with the mechanism when its regime is active.
mechanism_contribution.rationale: v1.7 regime collapse meant no mechanism discrimination. v1.8 requires each mechanism to activate when its regime fires.

advantage_realization.description: More than 55% of decisions where the controller deviates from the baseline action must show realized improvement in the primary endpoint.
advantage_realization.rationale: v1.7 had 95.9% advantage-gate activation but only 2.82% action change -- most activations did not translate to improvement. v1.8 requires realized improvement.

eligible_for_selection_only_if: no safety-guard harm against any required_baseline

root_causes_addressed_in_v1_8: regime_classifier: v1.8 requires regime balance (no regime >80%, min 3 regimes at >10%)
safety_envelope: v1.8 requires no practical safety harm vs any baseline
switching_mechanism: v1.8 adds lambda_switching to training grid and switching_robustness selection gate
rollout_calibration: v1.8 requires rollout_sign_accuracy >60% as eligibility gate
